title: Maximising Materials (Q&A)
description: Learn about efficient material use, nesting, and accurate marking out.

questions.prompt: Review the image of the laser cut components. Discuss whether you think this is an efficient use of the material.
What is the process of arranging parts tightly together to minimise waste called?
What is this process called when being used in conjunction with CAD/CAM software?
Explain why the marking out of the material would need to be clear and dimensionally accurate for an assembly.
